result.summary: The page is mostly readable, but several visual/layout problems stand out: content is clipped horizontally, the fixed bottom navigation overlaps game tiles, and the selected bottom tab appears inconsistent with the current page.

issues.description: Game cards in the right column are cut off by the edge of the viewport, making titles and artwork partially hidden.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the game grid or carousel width so cards fit within the viewport, or make the horizontal scrolling behavior more intentional with proper spacing and visible scroll affordance.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the lower game tiles, cutting off part of the content near the bottom of the screen.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding/margin to the page content equal to the bottom navigation height so cards are not hidden behind it.

issues.description: The bottom navigation shows “POKER” as the active tab, while the visible page content is casino/home game content. This makes the current location unclear.
issues.suggestion: Highlight the correct active navigation item, likely “CASINO,” or update the page content if the user is actually in the Poker section.

issues.description: The top category navigation item on the right is partially clipped, showing only “Hot Ga…”.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the category carousel has proper padding and scrolling behavior so partially visible tabs do not look accidentally cut off.

issues.description: Some game tile overlays and labels are very close to card edges, especially on partially clipped cards, which makes the layout feel cramped.
issues.suggestion: Increase internal spacing and ensure overlay elements remain fully visible within each card.
